entry.title: Fiori : add new field on screen
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

Is it possible to add new field on this screen?

any instructions will be helpful.

Regards,

Manthana

entry.title: Re: Script to extract measure values and loop through the...
entry.content:
Hi ,

consider the below example and sample code:

Example :
Your table is named Table_1.
Your measure is in column index 0 (since there's only one measure).
Your condition is, for example, checking if any value exceeds 1000.


Ref. code :

let ds = Table_1.getDataSource();


ds.getData({
includeDimensions: false,
includeMeasures: true
}).then(function(data) {

let measureValues = [];

for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
let measureValue = data[i][0]; // First column contains the measure value
measureValues.push(measureValue);
}

 

let alertTriggered = false;
for (let i = 0; i < measureValues.length; i++) {
if (measureValues[i] > 1000) { // Your condition
alertTriggered = true;
break; // Exit loop on first match
}
}


if (alertTriggered) {
Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Error, "Warning: Some values exceed the limit!");
}
});

 

Hope this helps,

Thank you!

Giri

SAP - PSCC

entry.title: Amazing Event SAP Chota Talks -Hyderabad
entry.content:
I am had a privilege of sharing insights on Integrated scenarios of AI in #SAPBRIM as a speaker and truly inspiring to exchange knowledge with engaging and interactive audience.

SAP CHOTA TALKS Hyderabad 2025 (Q1) was propelled with SAP Business AI discussions, Panel discussions and speaker sessions.

Panel Discussion on "Jobs in Age of AI" each and every panelist  had his way of addressing the ambiguity about AI whether it enhances our jobs or over takes our Jobs.

It was great discussion hosted by Dr. Mahesh Kumar CV with  panel members Raghu Boddu, CISA, CFE, CDPSE Immanuel Kolagani Gupta Kandula

Pleasure is mine Sharing the stage with co speakers Koundinya Karanam  Dileep Kumar Saketi

Special thanks to Ruthvik Chowdary Poonam Goje Singh Dr. Mahesh Kumar CV for flawless event, your efforts are evident. 

#SAPCommunity #SITHyd

entry.title: SAP CHOTA TALKS Q1 - HYDERABAD - JUST THE BEGINNING!!
entry.content:
On February 22, 2025, the School of Management Studies at the University of Hyderabad hosted an outstanding SAP Chota Talks event. The gathering was a platform for enriching knowledge sharing, fostering community interaction, and sparking engaging discussions about the ever-changing SAP ecosystem.

The event featured insightful speaker sessions, an engaging panel discussion, and a deep dive into the impact of AI within the SAP ecosystem. These sessions provided valuable perspectives on how AI is shaping the future of SAP, sparking meaningful conversations about its potential and challenges.

It served as a wonderful platform for SAP professionals to meet, share experiences, and forge new connections. The event created a dynamic environment for networking, allowing attendees to engage with peers, exchange ideas, and build relationships that will support their growth.

@MaheshCV @Ruthvik_Chowdary Heartfelt thank you for organizing the event. Blog SAP CHOTA TALKS Hyderabad 2025 (Q1) - Event Highlights provides a thorough overview of the sessions, panel discussions, and the valuable knowledge shared during the event, offering a great resource for all those who attended and even those who couldn’t make it. We are excited and eager to see many more events like SAP Chota Talks, where knowledge is shared, connections are made, and innovation thrives.

entry.title: Re: Stopping blank reports from publications in SAP Analy...
entry.content:
Hi,

Unfortunately there is no out-of the box solution to this scenario. but there is a workarounds you can apply.

Workaround :

1. Create a Restricted Measure: Create a restricted measure that filters only when COUNT([QuoteID]) > 0.
2. Set Story Filter: Apply a filter at the story level that only includes users where the count is greater than 0.
3. Publication Will Skip Empty Reports: Since SAC Publications only distribute content based on the existing filter,sellers with no quotes will be excluded from the burst.

Thanks with regards

Giri

Mohit Bansal

entry.title: Picking through PDA with TO's assigned by user
entry.content:
Currently, we perform picking using the sheets printed by ZPFSM02 and the labels, which we believe is somewhat outdated. We think there might be a way to assign the TOs to users so that each of them can see what picking they need to do on their PDA.

Is there a way to do this? I am talking about SAP GSI ERP.

I'm thinking in something like LI13N where you can see who must perform the inventory.

 

Thank you very much.

Something like this but applied to SAP BYD.

entry.title: Re: "This message is from an external sender" creates fol...
entry.content:
If you don't have any problems with manually sent emails, check the headers of the automatic emails, such as the sender and subject. Does it look like spam?

  • Why Are My Emails Going to Spam

entry.title: Beyond SAP Cloud - Episode 6: SAP BTP Global Account & Subaccounts
entry.content:
This episode discusses the concept of global accounts and sub-accounts within the Business Technology Platform. It discusses how a global account serves as a central hub for managing resources, entitlements, and licenses, while sub-accounts act as subdivisions for organizing services, applications, and resources.

Takeaways

  • A global account is the top-level entity in the business technology platform, ideally having one per company per contract.
    • SAP Cloud Alm is an exception, delivered in a separate global account.
  • If there are multiple global accounts by mistake, SAP can help centralize them back into one global account.
  • Global accounts enable centralized management of costs, sub-accounts, resources, landscapes, licenses, and entitlements.
  • Boosters are prepackaged installations available only at the global account level for certain installations, such as product Document Reporting & Compliance (used for Peppol and E-document handling).
  • Sub-accounts exist within a global account and serve as subdivisions for organizing resources, applications, and services.
  • The global account manages overall entitlements, which can be distributed across sub-accounts by an administrator.
  • Sub-accounts provide logical separation for different purposes, like development, testing, production, regions, or specific projects.
  • Administrators can assign varying entitlements to sub-accounts, depending on the needs of different services or teams.

entry.title: Fiori: add new field on standard tab or custom new tab
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

is it possible to add new field on standard tab or new custom Tab?

entry.title: Send data from Signavio Process intelligence to SAP analytic cloud
entry.content:
We want to send data from SAP Signavio Process intelligence to SAP analytic cloud for analysis.

is there any possibility to do that and if yes, what are the procedure for that.

SAP Signavio Process Intelligence SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors API language
entry.content:
Hi @shatsijev ,

normally you can look in the Data Dictionary in SuccessFactors to see if there is such a property:

If I understand correctly you are querying the country object? The country object should have depending on what languages you activated in your instance have properties reflecting the language.

For example there is an:
'externalName_defaultValue'

and for each language something like this:
'externalName_en_US'

Also there is something like this:
'externalName_localized'

While localized works like you described, giving back the language of the user, you should try the specific language property and see if it is what you are looking for.

Hope this helps

Kind regards
Alexander

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Derivation of System ID from Application Server Directory (AL11)
entry.content:
Did you do a Threat Modelling Workshop for that?
The whole process is not clear to me.
Placing files on OS and also executing scripts (maybe from uploaded files?) looks risky to me. Some questions coming to my mind right now: Who can upload files? How do you protect the path? Who can execute scripts? Who delivers scripts? Why is it on OS level?

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration – Use Poll-Enrich with SFTP Adapter
entry.content:
Hi @AnujaSH ,

You will have add a router condition to handle this case.

You can use below condition:

${property.CamelLoopIndex} = '0' and ${property.SAP_PollEnrichMessageFound} = 'false'

This condition is basically checking if it is the first loop and no file is found.

 

Thanks,

Ankita

entry.title: How to handle errors for semantic key with number range in RAP?
entry.content:
Following scenario:

Managed RAP BO wit draft with managed numbering and UUID as key. In addition a semantic key should be generated by the system as a non-key field using a number range object. How do you do this correctly?

I tried using a determination on save and using number_get_next there. That works usually, but:

  • In case of errors you can only report a warning in a determination using reported as there is no failed which the user can chose to ignore. According to the documentation (https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/determination-and-validation-modelling#failed-entries-from-determinations) you should store the error somewhere in a buffer and check for it in a validation.
  • While that does work, in case of an error the save is blocked but also the number from the number range has still been picked since the LUW used in the determination is not rolled back? This results in a number gap.

I had a look at late unmanaged numbering but that only seems to be usable for the key field which in my case should still be managed numbering with UUID.

Is this scenario not covered or am I missing something?

entry.title: What's new in FP03 of Transportation Management in S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition 2023
entry.content:
We are proud to announce that today we have released Feature Package FP03 for S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition 2023. This brings many new innovations for Transportation Management.

In this article I will talk about the most important innovations in TM.

First, let us take a look at the

AI Enhancements.

As you may already know from the announcements made for FPS02, we have made significant investments in AI-based features. With this feature package, we are now enhancing AI-based goods receipt analysis.
AI-assisted Goods Receipt Analysis also supports Shipment Documents with multiple deliveries and nested hierarchy structures.

Extraction of data from the shipping document

This means that you can now scan the shipping documents that accompany truck deliveries, analyze the documents, compare them to data already in your system, and create consignment orders with that data. This new feature detects multiple deliveries as well as deep packaging hierarchies.
If there is a mismatch, it is automatically detected and you can respond with error handling to correct the erroneous data in your consignment document.

Innovations for Advanced Shipping and Receiving

In the area of Adv. S&R we have three new innovations. The most important of them is:

GTS-Integration in Decentral TM/EWM for Advanced Shipping and Receiving

In a system landscape where the Advanced Shipping and Receiving Process is performed in a decentralized TM/EWM environment, SAP Global Trade Services can now be integrated for the export scenario. In this process, the compliance check in GTS can be triggered based on the freight unit or freight order. This can be done manually or the process can be fully automated.

Architectural Overview of GTS-Integration in Decentral TM/EWM & Process Flow

In addition, after loading in EWM, the export declaration can be triggered in GTS. The creation of the customs invoice can be included in this process with a completely new message choreography.

 

The second topic in the context of Adv. S&R is the weight/volume update of outbound delivery order items for unpacked products. With this enhancement, it is now possible to update the weight and volume information of unpacked products, such as bulk products that are weighted in EWM, and send it to TM.

Last but not least in the context of Adv. S&R is the ability to synchronize predecessor documents for Rail Freight Orders. With this enhancement, it's possible to directly update predecessor documents such as the freight unit or inbound delivery with different quantities (more or less of a product quantity or packages).

 

Further Enhancements in the Freight Document Execution

Further enhancements are available for multimodal processes in the air and in the ocean,

  • Automatically Set CU to Loaded on a Road Freight Order. This process enhancement makes it possible to automatically set a container unit to loaded at the latest when the truck is checked out at the loading location. This reduces the number of manual steps required.
  • Unassign, assign a container unit of a pick-up freight orders & Improved display of handling execution status in the overview tab for freight bookings. To further simplify document handling in multi-modal scenarios, new actions have been introduced. These new actions make assigning and unassigning container units to pick-up freight orders more efficient. New actions for deleting containers in a freight order are also available.
  • There is also an enhancement available in the TORGenericRequest_In service. With this enhancement, the carrier can now update header changes as well as actual departure dates/times.


Planning & Network Enhancements

A solution that many of you may have been waiting for is a new, innovative, and straightforward way to determine the carrier in a freight unit, consignment order, or freight order. This innovation greatly simplifies the carrier determination process by allowing a simple set of rules to be defined to find the right carrier. To do this, a new carrier determination profile has been introduced where simple criteria such as source and destination locations can be used to select the carrier. This new profile can be integrated with Excel for easier maintenance and a simulation report is also available.

The new profile can be assigned to order types.

Carrier determination in a freight order

This new feature is processed, for example, when a freight unit is created or data is changed. Or when a user manually creates a freight order, for example with the function 'Create Capacity Document based on groups'.

The carrier can be inherited from the previous document, or it can be created from scratch if the previous documents do not contain a carrier. Along with this new feature, mass change capabilities for the carrier are also introduced in the Transportation Cockpit. I think this really a awesome new feature.

 

There are also several other enhancements in Planning & Network. I'll mention just a few of them here.
Consideration of split breaks: A nice enhancement to driver time constraints is a topic that is defined in the EU driver regulations. According to these rules, breaks can be further split.

Another helpful feature introduced in embedded scheduling is that it avoids short loading or driving times before calendar breaks like weekends or non-working days.

Avoidance of activities prior to non-working days


These enhancements allow for more compact scheduling results and improved resource and driver utilization.

 

With this feature package, we are also improving the manual load planning capabilities. Specifically for 3D load planning, a new toolbar configuration is introduced that allows you to define which manual load planning actions should be displayed. Manual planning is also further supported with additional usability features such as better item selection (e.g. select all of the same stack, ...) and better item positioning (e.g. align, swap, mirror, lift up&down, ...). This helps the planner to use 3D load planning more efficiently.

Customized Toolbar with new actions for manual planning in 3D load planning

 

Another important feature is that street-level routing on the map now takes into account the departure time of the document stage. This means that time is now used on the map for more accurate routing.

Not to forget the performance improvements for the VSR Optimizer. These performance improvements are significant and you can find more information in this blog.

 

There are also a number of enhancements in the area of

ERP document integration

Let us first talk about 3 smaller topics in this area:

There will be a report available to activate ERP documents (MM/SD/LE) for integration with TM. This report is very helpful when TM is used for the first time and existing documents need to be activated for TM integration. Instead of having to manually find and modify documents to make them relevant for TM integration, these documents can now be easily activated by a report.

Another useful feature is the switch for the integration of Purchase Scheduling Agreements (PSAs). Various reports can be used to stop the integration of PSAs, deactivate or reactivate documents and, for example, trigger or deactivate nJIT SPCs.

Very often it is necessary to check if the components of a component group are dangerous goods. Therefore, a DG check on component group level is required. To achieve this, a new BAdI is introduced to pass the component for a classic Dangerous Goods check (PS&S). If the check for any component is positive, the component group header is marked as dangerous goods.

Integration of nJIT S2C Outbound Deliveries in TM

As with the integration of nJIT for inbound deliveries in FP2, we now offer the integration of nJIT for outbound deliveries. As in the inbound case, the logistically relevant product is the component group material. This means that the freight unit in TM is created at the component group level. The Advanced Shipping Notification can be sent with additional information such as slot number and JIT call reference.

Integration of nJIT Outbound delivery to TM

 

With FP02, we have introduced functionality in Freight Unit Building and Planning based on any unit of measure. Charging and settlement now also support any UoM at the product level.
This means that scale bases, calculation bases, rate tables, and agreements can now work with dimensionless units such as meters or pieces.

 Usage of any Unit of Measurement in charge calculation

 

 

This was the latest and greatest of Transportation Management in S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition 2023 FP03. 

S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition 2025 is already in the works. You can be curious about what will be delivered later this year. You can always get a preview of what is planned in the Roadmap Explorer.

Further information can be found here:

  • What’s New Viewer
  • SAP TM Product Page on sap.com
  • SAP Community for Transportation Management
  • SAP Transportation Management Group on LinkedIn

entry.title: EWAレポートに関わるジョブについて
entry.content:
ご担当者様

お世話になっております。

EWAレポートのデータ取得から生成に至るまでに実行されるジョブが存在しているかと思いますが、

それらすべてのジョブ名と実行内容について教えていただけますでしょうか？

背景としては、別ケースで特定のEWAレポートの評価が不完全になる現象が起こったのですが、

一時的な接続エラーが発生していたと担当者の方にご回答いただきました。

EWAにかかわるジョブの実行タイミングが影響している可能性を考えて今回問い合わせさせていただいたという流れになります。

 

以上、よろしくお願いいたします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: EWAレポートに関わるジョブについて
entry.content:
ご担当者　様

平素よりお世話になっております。

管理対象システム（ABAP）におけるタスク「SAP EarlyWatch Alert」は、SDCCNダウンロードデータを収集し、SOLMANに送信するタスクです。そのSDCCNダウンロードデータはEWAレポートを生成するデータソースです。
Solmanジョブ「SM:EXEC SERVICES 」は管理対象システムから送信したSDCCNダウンロードデータを処理して、レポートを生成するジョブです。
詳細につき、KBA0002729186 - General Process of EWA Generation in SAP Solution Manager 7.2をご確認ください。

以上、よろしくお願いいたします。

SAPサポート

entry.title: Re: Time Variance not working for period comparison in SA...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thankyou for your reply

Yes, I have gone through this article....one of them is useful if I want to comapre same month of different year....but not not for month on month of same year...

as if we set Current Month -CM amd Previous Month. -PM..it will only comapre two months i.e. CM and PM

but I want to compare month on mont for every month in same year...like Jan Feb, March April etc....
e.g.  we have sales of 10 unit in Jan, 20 unit in Feb, 5 unit in March in 2025....etc etc..I want to know how much increase or decresce happening month on month..thats seemes to eb possible only with time variance function in SAC but its not workingt in my case..and would like to know how to resolve that issue ?

entry.title: Customizing backoffice widget behaviour with js?
entry.content:
In backoffice, for the Customer item type, the widget for user groups is a list of groups. I would like to add some js events to this list.

I tried to add in my custombackoffice/resources/custombackoffice-backoffice-config.xml something like this:

<context type="Customer" merge-by="type" parent="Principal">
    <ea:attribute qualifier="groups">
       <ea:editor property="groups" widget="myCustomGroupEditor" />
    </ea:attribute>
</context>

Inside custombackoffice/resources/custombackoffice-backoffice-widgets.xml I added this:

<widgets xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
        xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="http://www.hybris.com/schema/cockpitng/widgets.xsd">
    <resources>
       <script src="custombackoffice/resources/backoffice/widgets/customListEditor.js"/>
    </resources>
    <widget-definition id="myCustomGroupEditor" class="my.namespace.MyCustomGroupEditor"/>
</widgets>

Inside custombackoffice/resources/backoffice/widgets/customListEditor.js I just added a console.log to test if the js is executed with no success (and no errors) after compiling and resetting backoffice.

How should I configure my xml's in order to add custom js events to an OOTB widget?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Message No. KT299
entry.content:
Is your system live, are you creating a new company...

Check in company code and control area for common

  • Chart of Account
  • Currency code (can be an alternate currency, defined as type 20 CA)

Also, if required can you reset Transaction Data for this company code, The procedure depends on your system type, please add a tag such as 'SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition', 'SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition' or relevant tag.

  • change chart of account of a company code

entry.title: Re: Value help search in Smart Filterbar
entry.content:
I was giving the wrong annotation target in the file. it should be like below 

<Annotations Target="Odataservice.Mainentity(which is mapped to smart filterbar) /Plant">
 
Finally the issue got resolved.

entry.title: Re: SFTP File Level Checks in SAP BTP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi @Srishti_Gupta 

Thank you for the blog.

I am also doing the same thing and archiving the file once process completes.

However, I am facing issues during archiving where only few files gets archived successfully but the others are not moved and remain at source folder.

There are no errors in the iflow which would stop the post processing step.

Did you also face any such issues? Or if you know why this behavior is experienced?

 

Thanks,

Ankita

entry.title: Re: Selective data migration approach
entry.content: Hi venkat_narasimhan2, added tag 'SAP Business Transformation Center' here. https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/q-amp-a-for-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-how-to-get-your-answer-faster/ba-p/13934481 Best regards, Irene

entry.title: Re: Delta load in SAP Datasphere replication flow fails
entry.content:
Hi Florin,

 Are you using replication flow in datasphere? As far as I know replication flow won't use DP agent.
You can try to run it again, check DP agent log for the extractor name, is there any record in the log? 
If DP agent is not used, you can raise a new question to sap datasphere. 

Best regards
Helen

entry.title: Re: Selective data migration approach
entry.content:
Hi @venkat_narasimhan2 ,

I also tried to search with "Selective Data Transition", and found a KBA which contains comprehensive message regarding SDT. Hope this helps.

KBA 3018442 - Selective Data Transition and Selective Data Transition Engagement

Best regards,

Irene

entry.title: HTML Application is not appearing in the HTML Application section in SAP BTP
entry.content:
HI,

I had created CAPM Application in BAS and was successfully deployed in Cloud foundry and in Instance and Subscription i can the HTML Application repository but now my issue is that when i navigate to the HTML Application tab and not able to see the HTML Application.

Thanks

Durga Prasanth

entry.title: Re: Enter Manual Contract Accruals
entry.content:
According to information from our development and product management team, this should not be relevant with imminent loss handling.

Please check the proposal:

There was a question on the purpose of posting manual contract accruals. The action “Enter Manual Contract Accruals” offers the possibility to enter manual contract accruals and thus change the total recognized cost or recognized revenue. It is posted to extra accounts. These amounts will not be changed by the closing run or by the action “Revalue”. But when the stage of the object equals “Completed”, the balance of such adjustments will be cancelled by the next closing run or by the execution of the action “Revalue” in the corresponding app.

entry.title: Fiori: add new field on standard tab or custom new tab
entry.content:
Hi Expert: on create contract screen. there will be Attention Required field.

is this one can configurable.

can I customized my own logic for example based on expiring within 90 days is medium.

entry.title: SAP Ariba Supplier enablement
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I have a requirement from a customer utilizing the SAP Ariba Supplier Management solution. They need to categorize suppliers with common characteristics into specific groups and sub-groups.

For example:

  • Main groups: Vendors, IT Vendors, and Service Providers

  • Under these main groups: Service Providers: Contracting, Painting, Construction

In my research, I discovered that this feature might be achievable through supplier enablement. I have a couple of questions:

  1. Is supplier enablement a separate solution and license from supplier management?

  2. If so, can these requirements be fulfilled through the supplier management solution?

Thank you for your insights.

SAP Ariba Sourcing SAP Ariba Supplier Lifecycle and Performance

Kevin

entry.title: Measures hierarchy in SAP Datasphere Analytic model
entry.content:
Hi guys

I'm looking for an option to create nested measures in SAP Datasphere Analytic, as we could do with SAP Bex Query designer

I couldn't find such an option, any alternatives?

 

Shlomi

entry.title: Re: Comma problem in CSV file upload from application server
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

Please have a look of my approach.
I am considering that only the fields with comma in its value is coming encapsulated with - " 
and we are not doing any REPLACE_OCCURENCES, Instead we are splitting all values with comma into internal tables and finding the the values containing - " from where we determine starting and ending of the field value.

This works for any number of fields that has comma in its values. But the only catch is the values with comma has to come encapsulated with  - ".

entry.title: Re: Uploading Data to S/4HANA On-Premise from BTP HANA Cl...
entry.content: Seems you want to replicate data to S/4HANA On-Premise system, then please setup SDI to use S/4 hana as target and "BTP HANA Cloud DB" as source through HANAAdapter to do replication. From SDI user case point of view, this should work, but you have to confirm if it is allowed to change the HANA database for S/4 hana directly through replication since this is application related tables.

entry.title: Re: A warm welcome to our new SAP Champions in January 2025
entry.content: Congratulations to all the SAP Champions! 🎉 Your dedication, expertise, and contributions to the SAP community are truly inspiring. Wishing you continued #success in your journey ahead!

entry.title: Re: Cost Centers and Distribution Cycle with SKF
entry.content:
Dear expert,

the best way for customer is to address this new feature requirement via Customer influence portal  https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/

Best regards

Eugen

entry.title: Re: Foreign currency GL balance 0 but with a local compan...
entry.content:
Basically clearing those document items should reset the balance in local currency.

If accounts are not managed as open item, consider transactions related to Foreign Currency Revaluation.

entry.title: Re: Date calculation in TM Freight Order/Booking
entry.content: Thanks Ajit. That was where I maintained the cut-off days too, except mine is for the road freight. I am using the cockpit to do the FO creation. Do I need to maintain anything else to ensure that the system is using the schedule for the calculation and population of the dates? Cheers.

entry.title: Re: Fiori : add new field on screen
entry.content: As you would in this lesson : Creating Visual Filters ?

entry.title: Re: Value Accelerator Event - Structure question
entry.content:
Hi Sanddie,

I think this is basically only a design question on how the accelerators have been set up. AFAIK, the accelerators use this event in certain other calculations in dashboards, e.g. when calculating ageing. So removing it will also most likely impair standard dashboards.

But as you mentioned, there would also be other ways to calculate this.

Best

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Tokyo 2025 Day1
entry.content:
The number of registered attendees has reached 113 (30 onsite and 83 online), Now.
We look forward to seeing even more of you there!

entry.title: Re: Empower Your Enterprise: SAP BRIM Explained
entry.content: Thank you Biraj for sharing your experience.

entry.title: Re: Automatic creation for Purchase Requisitions for Service
entry.content:
Hi @Wesley89 

You can create a report using BAPI : BAPI_REQUISITION_CREATE and schedule that report to run in background once every month whether it's at the start of the month or last.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Issues with Import Supplier Invoice Application (India Localization)
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PO_CREATE1: Error Message ME083 - Enter GL/Account
entry.content: The error ME083 occurs because SAP has a 99-line limit for multiple account assignments in BAPI_PO_CREATE1. To resolve this, you need to split the PO item into multiple items once the number of service lines exceeds 99. Each new item should have the same material/service details and continue assigning the remaining service lines, ensuring that no single item exceeds the 99-line restriction.

entry.title: Re: VAR case forwarding via SAP Cloud ALM ITSM API
entry.content:
Hello @john_p_grimes,

Yes, now I understand how the message go through our CALM to yours, thanks for the process, I was not sure how the fact that we create a call from our third party to our CALM with btp destinations will do the work.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Changing pre-delivered master data in public cloud (F...
entry.content:
Hi Henrike,

Thanks for your comment and the informative links!
Although the help portal does not clearly state which attributes can be modified, I took it that pre-delivered master data can basically be modified (unless stated otherwise). 

Regards,
Takashiro

entry.title: Re: Product compliance events and integration
entry.content:
Hello krishg,

currently it is not possible to use the Product Compliance Events and Tasks for your scenario, as they cannot be sent to an event mesh. 

The way to access the product compliance relevant data is by using the public APIs. Here a list of all available APIs: https://api.sap.com/search?searchterm=SAP_COM_0797&tab=APIs&$refinedBy=true&$type=(%22API%22,%22API%20Package%22).

However, this only allows a pull of the data from third party systems and no active push from the SAP system. 

If there are APIs missing or you definitely need a push mechanism from the SAP system, you can add an improvement request to the Continuous Influence Portal for Product Compliance: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3334

Hopefully this helps.

Best regards,

Markus

entry.title: Print out physical inventory document doesn`t work- Fiori
entry.content:
Hi,

i`m trying to print physical inv. doc. using Fiori app F0379A - Manage Pgysical Inv. Doc. but i get an error "exception raised without specific error" - as you can see on the attachment.
Counted was not yet started, just inventory document was created and i would like to print this document.

any sugestion what i shoud check, correct ?

entry.title: FWZE Amount not correct
entry.content:
I use FWZZ --> FWZE 

Units = 9000 +400 -100-8000= 1300

Why amount caculate = 9.400 * 400 = 3.760.000

How to caculate amount = 400 * 1300 = 520.000

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PO_CREATE1: Error Message ME083 - Enter GL/Account
entry.content: There is a master KBA 1850043 - Error ME083 generated from BAPI_PO_CREATE1, BAPI_PO_CHANGE or BAPI_CONTRACT_CREATE

entry.title: VAT splitted in transaction Code FB60 S4HANA ON PREMISE
entry.content:
Goodmorning Expert,

in S4HANA On Premise 2022 when I try to post a vendor invoice, for an Italian company, with two Gl account line items (also the same GL account) with the same VAT code for both line items,  the document posted  shows two line items for the automatically calculated VAT and not just one (one for each line items of GL Account).

In the system and for the company code is not active the splitting document functionality.

If I try to post the same document with the transaction code FBR2 or FB01 or MIRO, the posted document is correct.

Do you have any ideas on how to solve it?

entry.title: Re: Access event log, case attributes via API to perform...
entry.content:
Hi there,

We have published a tutorial that focuses on this topic.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/signavio-process-intelligence-machine-learning.html

Try it out and let me know what you think of it!

entry.title: Re: Restrict pay statement access
entry.content:
Hi, 

Depending the mashup you are using there is a BADI for restrict pay statement access. In this BADI you should be able to enter the logic of your company. 

For example if you have an EC-ECP scenario with direct pay statement the BADI is explained at: 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_EMPLOYEE_CENTRAL_PAYROLL/185f14fbe60d4bbb8d7d5e4f8d89b24b/8760a513917a417ab63c0df1ace35730.html 

Regards.

entry.title: Re: How to work with a physical Tracking ID in SAP DM
entry.content:
hey Sascha, here some additional details. yes I mean I've used the data collection to map the first SFC to the second. The cycle time is 70 seconds and we produce 500 parts a day.

Is it a good practice to combine the ID's into 1 SFC?

We have no experience with the DMCi api and will take a look into this. If we want to use the work instructions api can we add a work instruction to a specific SFC? and later search by that work instruction? It feels a bit hacky.

entry.title: Does a SAC workspace functions like private files?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am currently setting up SAC and would like to use the workspaces to clearly separate different departments. Additionally, I want to restrict permissions for private files so that work can only be done in public files.

I have now noticed that when the permissions for private files are removed, there are no files left in the workspace. I assume that a workspace functions like private files. Is that correct?

As a solution, I am left with the option of defining custom roles for the workspace teams, right?

Best regards,
Niels

entry.title: Re: BR1585E BR*Tools parameter 'active_pdbs' is set for 'NON_MULTI_TENANT_DB'
entry.content: Make sure the "actve_pdbs" parameter for BR*Tools is set only in case of available pluggable databases. It can be set only for Multitenant databases. In case the target system is not yet configured as a Multitenant, then it must not be set.

entry.title: Re: Automatic creation for Purchase Requisitions for Service
entry.content:
Consider using a small report to duplicate PR from reference one using Enjoy BAPI

  • BAPI_PR_GETDETAIL - Get Details for One MEREQ Object
  • BAPI_PR_CREATE - Create Enjoy Purchase Requisition

Schedule a periodic job executing this report.

entry.title: Re: Automatic creation for Purchase Requisitions for Service
entry.content: Check 1803189 - FAQ: End of Support of ME21, ME51, BAPI_PO_CREATE and Archiving Reports etc.  for old (pre Enjoy) transactions and BAPI which are no longer supported by SAP.

entry.title: Re: I am trying to send auto email to vendor when goods r...

entry.title: Re: Value Help with parameter does not open in Parameter...
entry.content: Oh, and btw: may it just be this in your case?

entry.title: Re: Value Help with parameter does not open in Parameter...
entry.content: Oh, and btw: may it just be this in your case? "Actions with Parameters In case a value help is added to an action parameter (e.g. via annotation @ValueHelpDefinition in corresponding abstract entity for the action parameters) the value help isn't added automatically to the service and must be added to the service definition explicitly.

entry.title: Deficit of SL Unrestricted-use Message No. M7021
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I created an inbound delivery via /SCWM/PRDI, generated a goods receipt, and completed the putaway process using a warehouse order and warehouse task. I wanted to check if the goods receipt status was updated in VL32N on the ERP side, but it remains in status A (Not Started).

The stock type in EWM is F2 (Unrestricted-Use Warehouse). In SMQ2, I found the following error message.

 

Do you have any suggestions?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to create MIRO with Assessable Values using BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE
entry.content:
Hi All,

Ask the ABAPER to refer the notes and instructions in it 
https://me.sap.com/notes/3525350 

Also refer below notes:
2955617 - GST India: MM BAPI Enhancement for GST Fields
3019866 - Corrections to make messages of class J_1IG_MSGS configurable in MRM BAPI
3134494 - GST S4 HANA India: Corrections to MM BAPI Note 2955617.

Specifically for Assessable value field you can check note number - 3134494 and the attachment in it
DDIC_Activities_MM_BAPI'.pdf.

With the help of above, you will be able to get the assessable value field in BAPI and post custom invoice successfully.

Thanks,
Mahesh Mahajan

entry.title: Re: How do we call SOLR externally with SSO enabled?
entry.content:
Disabling SSO for Solr in Commerce Cloud is against security regulations.
"3320534 - How to connect Solr through cURL/Postman in SAP Commerce" https://me.sap.com/notes/3320534/E
Solr Security https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/b2f400d4c0414461a4bb7e115dccd779/f7251d5a1d6848489b1ce7ba46300fe6.html#solr-security

When SSO would be disabled, SAP security measures are no longer upheld and SAP cannot monitor environment in terms of secureness as effectively. Solr SSO was introduced to protect Solr endpoints even if they were set to public, intentionally or not. When one disables SSO the Solr admin console is not protected and anybody can login.

Disabling SSO for Solr in general means:
- Reduced security to access Solr
- No guarantee in reference to security implications around Solr

To access Solr API with SSO enabled one could make use of the OCC API for data exchange.

One could extend the Commerce OCC API, which would gather the relevant data from Solr. Utilizing this method, one would need though to ensure on customer's side that the filtering settings on the endpoint where OCC API is set up, are strict enough to guarantee security. Furthermore, such a configuration has the added benefit of the authentication mechanisms of OCC.

Please check documentation on OCC implementation:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/3476714bba0b4cb9b3eb58c270e44439/8c19ab00866910148f87bf32d4a60d38.html
https://help.sap.com/doc/ab7bf5127abb4c67a55df4ea67507511/2211/en-US/index.html#_overview

entry.title: Re: SAP Business client 8.0 - Remove dotted line border d...
entry.content:
Hello Francois64,

unfortunately the dotted line is here to stay. The change came with version 5.0.

In the beginning the line was very irritating to me. Today I  don't even realize it anymore. If you cannot live with it you could open a CI for SAP GUI for Windows. This might help, although I am not very optimistic:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/this-is-your-opportunity-to-influence-the-development-of-sap-business/ba-p/13573527

 

Kind Regards,

Sandra

entry.title: Re: #service document Cannot find customer group 1-5 in s...
entry.content:
Hello,

Customer Group is used for several purposes, e.g., Pricing and Discounts, Reporting and Analysis. It is now not available in standard fields in Service Order Management. If you want to add the fields, you need custom development. 

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: How to: Extension of WebDynpro Configurations due to changes in CDS Views
entry.content:
The backend and WebDynPro must be properly configured to enable a field for filtering in a WebDynpro application. This involves modifying the CDS (Core Data Services) views to ensure the field is recognised and available for filtering in the frontend configuration.

This topic concerns these Fiori Apps, but the principle is the same for each WebDynpro App.

CDS Query (object)CDS Query (2C+SQL View)CDS Query WebDynpro ConfigurationApp ID
C_CostCenterQ2001CFICOSTCTRQ2001FIS_FPM_OVP_IPACTCCF0963
C_CostCenterPlanActQ2001CFICCPLANACT2001FIS_FPM_OVP_IPPLANACTCC01W0081
C_ProfitCenterQ2701CFIPROFCTRQ2701FIS_FPM_OVP_IPACTPCF0959
C_ProfitCenterPlanActQ2701CFIPCPLANACT2701FIS_FPM_OVP_IPPLANACTPC01W0079
C_MarketSegmentQ2501CFIMARKSEGMQ2501FIS_FPM_OVP_IPACTMSF0960
C_MarketSegmentPlanActQ2501CFIMSPLANACT2501FIS_FPM_OVP_IPPLANACTMS01W0078
C_ProfitAndLossQ2901CFIPROFLOSSQ2901FIS_FPM_OVP_IPACTPLF0958
C_ProfitAndLossPlanActQ2903CFIPLPLANACTFIS_FPM_OVP_IPPLANACTPL03F1710
C_FunctionalAreasQ2801CFIFAQ2801FIS_FPM_OVP_IPACTFAF1583A
C_FunctionalAreaPlanActQ2801CFIFAPLANACT2801FIS_FPM_OVP_IPPLANACTFA01W0077
C_InternalOrderPlanActQ2101CFIIOPLANACT2101FIS_FPM_OVP_IPPLANACTIO01W0076
C_SalesOrderQ2301CFISALESORDQ2301FIS_FPM_OVP_IPACTSOF1582A
C_ProjectQ2201CFIPROJECTQ2201FIS_FPM_OVP_IPACTPR F0961
C_ProjectPlanActQ2201CFIPRPLANACT2201FIS_FPM_OVP_IPPLANACTPR01W0080

Backend changes in CDS views:

Variant 1: Extending the CDS View

If the field is not yet available for filtering, you must modify the CDS view and add the appropriate annotations.

  •  Create a new CDS view extension and ensure you use your naming conventions where required.

 Important: Replace placeholders such as ZXXCOSTEXT,  C_CostCenterQ2001, ZXX_C_COST_CENTER_EXT, and I_JournalEntryItemCube.SourceLedger with names relevant to your implementation. These correspond to:

  • Catalog name
  • CDS view name
  • CDS extension view name
  • Field name

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'ZXXCOSTEXT'
extend view C_CostCenterQ2001 with ZXX_C_COST_CENTER_EXT
{
@Consumption.filter: { selectionType: #SINGLE, multipleSelections: true, mandatory: false }
I_JournalEntryItemCube.SourceLedger

}

 

  • Save and activate the CDS view

This will add Source Ledger to the C_CostCenterQ2001 query as a Filter. However, to see it within the Fiori App, you need to change the configuration.

Variant 2: Using Metadata Extension

If the field already exists in a standard CDS view but does not have a filter annotation, you can use a metadata extension instead of modifying the view directly:

  • Ensure Metadata Extensions Are Allowed (If not, you will need to use Variant 1.).
  • If you do not have this annotation present in the queries mentioned above, you will need to install this SAP Note 3509451 to your system.
  • Create a Metadata Extension

Important: Replace placeholders such as CostCenterQ2001 and CalendarWeek with names relevant to your implementation. These correspond to:

  • CDS view name
  • Field name

 

 

@Metadata.layer: #CUSTOMER
annotate entity C_CostCenterQ2001
    with 
{
    @Consumption.filter: { selectionType: #SINGLE, multipleSelections: true, mandatory: false }
    CalendarWeek;
    
}

 

I would suggest you use @Metadata.layer: #CUSTOMER, so it is determined what was done.

WebDynpro configuration:

  • Open the Fiori application Cost Centers – Actuals. Right-click in the filter area and select ‘Technical Help’.  Technical Help window will open.

  • In the technical help window, click on the shown area (Application Configuration).  A new window will open.

  • In the application configuration window, click on the Configuration Name.  You will be redirected to the Page Schema.

  • Scroll down to locate the Overview Page Schema. Expand the Page Header Area and then click on Config ID.

  • In the newly opened window, drag the desired filter into the Page Header Area within the schema below.

  • Click save.

Once all these steps are done you will see the field in the search filter among other fields like Ledger, Fiscal Year of Ledger etc., the position on where the field appears is up to you.

 

I would like to say a big thanks to my colleague, who helped me with creating this blog and preparing the documentation.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM Implementation and Operations Configuration Webinar Series
entry.content:
@Loffredo We now have SAP ALM GTM team based out in NA who are delivering sessions, request you to follow the blog - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-application-lifecycle-management-alm-rollout-americas/ba-p/14022767

Thanks,

Aj

entry.title: Re: #COE#TAIT Service contract and service order billing...
entry.content:
Hello,

To find service contract and service order billing-related CDS views, as well as those related to billing plans and actual billing, you can utilize the View Browser app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. Here’s how you can proceed:

1. **Access the View Browser App**: This application can be accessed within your SAP Fiori launchpad.

2. **Search for Relevant CDS Views**:
- Use keywords like "Service Contract Billing," "Service Order Billing," "Billing Plan," and "Actual Billing" to search for the relevant CDS views.
- Look for views that might have these terms in their titles or descriptions.

3. **Review Annotations**:
- Once you've identified potential CDS views, check their details under the Annotation tab specifically looking at `ObjectModel.supportedCapabilities`. This will help in understanding the specific use cases they are best suited for.

4. **Check for Predefined Standard CDS Views**:
- It’s also recommended to look for predefined standard CDS views that SAP provides. These are generally useful for reporting and analytics purposes. Here is a list of CDS views for Service 

CDS Views for Service

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to include the attachments for invoices created through recurrence?
entry.content: Hello Angeline, My team is responsible for the Manage Recurring Supplier Invoices app. After consulting team experts, it's confirmed that the attachments of a recurring supplier invoice will NOT be copied to individual invoices when they are posted periodically. Kind regards, Anne

entry.title: The Case for Upgrades in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - New whitepaper published
entry.content:
Is your business still running an older version of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition? You could be missing out on critical innovations and putting your system at risk. Friendly reminder: Mainstream and extended maintenance for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition systems on versions 1709, 1809, 1909, and 2020 will conclude in December 2025. Now is the perfect time to plan your upgrade and stay ahead with the latest features and support!

 

Read the whitepaper, "Embrace agility and upgrade for success."

 

 Why Upgrade? It’s More Than Just a Task

Upgrading your SAP system isn't just about keeping up; it's about gaining a strategic advantage. Think of it as future-proofing your business. Here's what you stand to gain:

  • Supercharged Security: Outdated systems are vulnerable. Regular upgrades keep you protected with the latest cybersecurity measures and data protection. SAP only guarantees security updates for the most recent feature and support packages, so staying current is essential.
  • Innovation at Your Fingertips: Running on the latest release of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition gives you access to continuous innovation, including advanced business AI, automation, and predictive analytics. New features like the AI copilot Joule, Microsoft Teams integration, and SAP Fiori improvements boost productivity and user experience. (see full list here). These innovations are included in your subscription—make sure you don’t miss out!
  • Cut Costs and Complexity: Sticking with older versions often leads to costly and complex custom code. Regular upgrades in combination with a clean core approach can help you stay closer to the SAP standard, making your system more agile and easier to manage.
  • Maximize Your ROI: You've already invested in SAP. By upgrading, you're maximizing that investment. You're unlocking the full potential of your system and getting the most value out of your license.
  • Practice makes Perfect: It's like training a muscle. The more often you upgrade, the easier the process becomes. Regular upgrades equip your team with the know-how for faster, smoother projects with fewer disruptions. Customers like Hitachi High-Tech have reduced their upgrade projects to just a single month by adopting a regular upgrade approach. Read Hitachi´s complete upgrade story.

Build your Upgrade Routine:

Establishing your governance strategy and plan to fit your individual operation and needs is key. SAP recommends that you run on the latest release or at least one below the latest, aligning your IT change management and business release strategy, as well as your project schedule, with SAP S/4HANA release timelines. As announced with the new SAP S/4HANA release and maintenance strategy, new releases are delivered every second year, with three feature and support packages in between, offering you greater flexibility and easier-to-consume innovation.

SAP is Here to Help You Every Step of the Way

Upgrading doesn't have to be daunting. SAP provides a wealth of resources to ensure a smooth transition:

  • SAP Activate for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - Upgrade, a methodology for implementing SAP solutions, guides your team through the upgrade by prompting deliverables and tasks at the right time.  
  • SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA upgrades helps assess your upgrade efforts with analysis of your custom code, compatibility scope usage, and add-on usage.  
  • SAP guidance and resources for technical upgrade execution are included with software subscription., including tasks like operating system upgrade, database upgrade, and the technical installation of SAP S/4HANA upgrades. Please remember that as an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition customer, you're responsible for planning upgrades, requesting services, and handling post-upgrade tasks.
  • The Enterprise Support Academy and dedicated SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Value Maps* help upskill your team.  
  • SAP Services and Support including SAP Enterprise Support available with all cloud offerings, and several premium plans, can bring you a dedicated expert assistant for the short or long term.
  • SAP Partner Finder can help you identify a partner from our vast ecosystem for implementation services.  

 

In conclusion: By embracing regular upgrades and a clean core approach, you unlock a multitude of benefits, including accelerated innovation adoption and increased security and compliance. Building your upgrade routine and leveraging valuable tools, services and support from SAP and its ecosystem will result in a smoother upgrade journey.

So don’t let your system reach a point where a costly and time-consuming overhaul becomes essential to avoid slowdown. Maximize the value of your SAP investment - embrace agility and upgrade to stay ahead of the competition.

Read the whitepaper, "Embrace agility and upgrade for success."

Join our Upgrade dedicated SAP Community

Brought to you by the SAP S/4HANA RIG and Customer Care team

entry.title: Re: Workflow should trigger basis on another MDF Object
entry.content: Hi nirandjands, I am kinda confused of that requirement. Are you able to provide some kinda example and what exactly is the goal? of course with example data and not live data. As far as I know triggering workflows on import for MDF's is not supported. I am not sure but I think I read somewhere taht you might be able to if you were to make an odata request, but that requires plugging in a 3rd Party System. What might be possible is to trigger the workflow in object 1 and after it was approved sync the data to the second mdf object. Can you clarify your requirement?

entry.title: Re: Costs & Revenues getting mapped against separate WBS...

entry.title: Re: SAP analytics cloud upload job starter not appearing in story editor

thanks for your replys,

i've noticed that basically the upload job is valid only for public edit version,

if i open the version for edit, i can use the starter but afterwards it publishes the data, making the version no longer "edit", and then it dissappears from the starter builder the problem begins again.

entry.title: Re: How to get started as an SAP Builder
entry.content: thank you very much !

entry.title: NMi read timed out
entry.content:
Hello!

I have not found any post related to this topic so far, so please advise if you know.

We keep encountering this error in our BW productive system related to: "Error while executing the following command : -NMi read timed out (local port xx to address yy)", here being that yy potentially points us to our DataServices server. 

What is the NMi parameter and what would be the context of such an event?

This happens during a data load in the process chain and blocks all further operations until the next manual reload from what I know. The logs don't provide any more information than the message mentioned above.

There is also no trace in DS of this. Any advice would be great.

Thank you!

BW (SAP Business Warehouse)
